vocab.meaning: hợp thời trang, đón đầu xu hướng
vocab.example: While I appreciate a fashion-forward look, I refuse to wear anything that pinches my toes.

vocab.meaning: sự hỗ trợ vòm bàn chân
vocab.example: For someone who spends all day on their feet, proper arch support is a top priority.

vocab.meaning: sự thanh lịch trong cách ăn mặc
vocab.example: Occasionally, I will endure some discomfort for the sake of sartorial elegance at formal events.
I tend to invest in high-quality trainers with excellent shock absorption for my morning commutes.
I always try to strike a balance between a polished appearance and physical ease.

vocab.meaning: giày đóng thủ công theo yêu cầu
vocab.example: If money were no object, I would opt for bespoke footwear that is perfectly contoured to my feet.
Comfort, to me, means choosing shoes made of breathable material to keep my feet cool in the summer.

vocab.meaning: tác động/ấn tượng về mặt thị giác
vocab.example: Sometimes the visual impact of a designer heel is enough to tempt me, despite the pain.

vocab.meaning: thực dụng (chú trọng công năng hơn vẻ ngoài)
vocab.example: My daily choice of shoes is quite utilitarian; I need something robust that lasts all day.
I’ve switched to posture-friendly flats because high heels were starting to cause back issues.
